workflow.name: 01. CEREBRO - Cargador RAG

parameters.formDescription: Sube archivos para alimentar las bases de conocimiento RAG.

parameters.query: INSERT INTO {{ $node["Crear Chunks"].json.kb_table }} (content, metadata, embedding) VALUES ($1, $2, $3)

workflow.description: Fixed: Crear Chunks now reads KB name from form trigger node using $() syntax instead of $json which gets overwritten by Extract From File.
